# DocumentElementID

**Protocol**

An identifier for an element in a document.

## Declaration

```swift
protocol DocumentElementID : Decodable, Encodable, Hashable
```

## Implementing an element identifier

- **Element**: The document element type that this reference is for.

## Document elements

- **DocumentElement**: Represents an element that is contained within a document. Such elements can have identifiers that uniquely identify them within a document.
- **BasicDocumentElementID**: A default implementation for a document element identifier.
- **AssignableDocumentElement**: An element of an [doc://com.apple.Assignables/documentation/Assignables/AssignableDocument].
- **AssignedWorkDocumentElement**: An element of an [doc://com.apple.Assignables/documentation/Assignables/AssignedWorkDocument].

## Inherits From

- Decodable
- Encodable
- Equatable
- Hashable

## Conforming Types

- AssignableDocument.Page.ID
- AssignedWorkDocument.Page.ID
- BasicDocumentElementID
